suggested_rules: Records sharing the same route_id (e.g., Bx34) and representing the base route without conflicting variant labels should be merged as the same canonical identity, even when sourced from different documents.
suggestion.rationale: Both records share route_id 'Bx34', which is a strong identity field. The addendum record explicitly aliases route_bx34 and carries it as an identity key. The validator duplicate_global_identity signal confirms the collision is real. Neither record specifies a variant (local/SBS/limited), so both refer to the base Bx34 route. Complementary corridor descriptions (Fordham Road vs Bainbridge/Valentine Avenue) describe the same route's geography, not distinct services. The second record is an update about the same route from a different planning document.
